title: sphaeralcea fumariensis
intro: Sphaeralcea fumariensis, also known as the desert marigold, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mallow family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea fumariensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Sphaeralcea fumariensis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
